letter_text:
Department of the Treasury
Internal Revenue Service
Notice CP2000
Tax Year 2024

Proposed changes to your 2024 Form 1040.

The income or payment information we received from third parties (such as employers or banks) does not match the information you reported on your tax return. Because of this, we propose a change that would increase the tax you owe by $1,842.00, plus interest.

This is NOT a bill. If you agree with the changes, sign the enclosed Response form and return it. If you disagree, complete the Response form explaining why and include supporting documents.

Respond by March 3, 2026. If we do not hear from you by that date, we will send you a Statutory Notice of Deficiency.
